text: Cynthia honey, haven't heard from you in a few days. You eating? Grandma Rose asked about you twice today
Sorry Mom, brutal week on the line. I'm good, I'm eating, mostly staff meal lol. Tell Grandma I'm bringing the short ribs Sunday
She'll be thrilled. Come by 3, don't work yourself into the ground. Love you ❤️
Lucas drew you cooking again, it's covered in spaghetti lol. Still good for coffee Monday after Mom's?
Yes!! send me the spaghetti masterpiece. Monday's on me, I've got so much to tell you about the Newark Ave space
wait the one you walked?? ok I need ALL of it Monday. So proud of you 😭
yo chef you actually off Monday or 'off' answering vendor texts again? come by the Copper Still
ha, actually off. coming by after I see Gina. bringing an amaro I found, you have to put it in something
corner seat's yours. and no looking at your phone for once
Cynthia — first-press cider apples are landing next week, first pick. Also the storage roots are coming hard right now, you'll want extra. Truck loads 6 AM Saturday.
yes to the cider apples, building a winter dessert around them. bump my carrots to 3 cases, they're flying on the specials. I'll be there at 6 for first pick
Done. Saving you the best of both. See you Saturday.
Hi Cynthia — that washed-rind you loved is back in. Pulled two wheels for you. Want them on Thursday's run?
absolutely, both wheels. it sold out off the cheese course last week. anything new from the goat herd this winter?
A young chèvre coming in a couple weeks. I'll save you a sample to taste.
Chef — hedgehogs are flushing this year, got a beautiful batch. Black trumpets maybe two weeks out. Want in on the hedgehogs?
yes, take 5 lbs of the hedgehogs. holding them for a Friday special. text me the second the black trumpets are ready, those are mine
You got it. 5 lbs set aside for Thursday delivery. Trumpets the moment they're in.
Luis — hedgehogs and the new tomme land Thursday. Hold the bean work for me, I want to walk Dani through the puree before service
on it chef. prep list looks good, I'll break down the fish when it's in. you good for Friday's count?
110 on the books for Friday. we tasting the cider-apple special at 2, don't be late. you're my right hand on this one
Dani — walking through the chèvre plate at 3 tomorrow before service. Bring the plating notes you took last Friday
yes chef. also I roasted the buckwheat honey with the pears last night at home, it works. want me to sub it into the tart?
yes. push it Friday and I'll taste it before doors. good instinct
T — you working Christmas or you home? I've got Grandma Rose's biscotti dough resting, drop by tomorrow
home tonight, working NYE. I'll come by 2 tomorrow with the espresso setup. save me the almond ones
always. bring the amaro from last time too
Nick — Gina said your kitchen sink's still slow. If I'm off Monday I can watch Lucas while you look at it? just say the word
you're a saint, ha. Monday morning is perfect if you're up before 10. Lucas will lose it, he keeps talking about the pasta you made him
10 sharp. bringing the semolina, we're making pici with him. thank you for letting me hang with the kid
Frank — the Elm St numbers came back a little tight. Coffee Monday? I want to walk you through the buildout estimate before I get too far into it
Monday works. Harborside Roasters 11? Bring the vendor bids too, I want to see who's quoting what on hood work
11 it is. I'll print everything
Cynthia — this is Nate at Blackbird Orchards. Cold storage russets holding beautifully, plus the last batch of quince if you still want them. Delivery Thursday?
yes to both. 2 cases russets, 15 lbs quince if you can spare it. paste is going on the cheese board this weekend
Locked in. See you Thursday, chef.
Chef — Meadowlark here. Overwintered sage is exceptional this year, and the horseradish is fat. Any interest?
always. 3 bunches sage, 4 lbs horseradish root. also anything left on the bay laurel from November?
One last bundle of bay, saving it for you. Ships Wednesday.
Gina — Lucas can pick between the shells or the pici tomorrow, tell him. I've got both floured up
he says both 😂 obviously. also Mom wanted me to ask you to bring the good olive oil, hers is done
on it. bringing the Frantoio, tell her not to waste it on the salad, it's for finishing
Chef Cynthia — Riverstone Cheesemongers. We're cutting a wheel of the aged manchego Friday and thought of you first. 3 lb wedge OK?
yes please. also curious if you have any of the cave-aged blue from November left, that one paired beautifully with the honey
Half a wheel left. Slicing off 1.5 lb for you. Both go out Monday.
Mom — heads up, I'm bringing Frank to Sunday dinner. He wants to say hi to Dad about the postal-worker pension paperwork he asked about
wonderful! Grandma Rose will make extra braciole. He still take his coffee black?
black, always. and yes he still won't say no to Grandma's sfogliatelle, so make peace with that
Chef — Kettle Ridge Distillery here. Our applejack barrel program has openings for 2027. Small allocations only. Interested?
interested. small allocation is fine, I'll use it on the tasting menu when it's time. can you email the terms?
Sending PDF now. Deadline to reserve is Jan 15.
Luis — Friday count moved to 125. I want three extra prep hands from noon. Can you pull the on-call list?
done, texting Marco, Reyes, and the new guy. also we're short cambros again, I flagged Gianna
good. tell them Friday call at 12 sharp. I'll cover the tasting at 3
Cynthia honey, haven't heard from you in a few days. You eating? Grandma Rose asked about you twice today
Sorry Mom, brutal week on the line. I'm good, I'm eating, mostly staff meal lol. Tell Grandma I'm bringing the short ribs Sunday
She'll be thrilled. Come by 3, don't work yourself into the ground. Love you ❤️

Yes!! send me the spaghetti masterpiece. Monday's on me, I've got so much to tell you about the Newark Ave space
